transcript_text: This is CBI Mumbai. A parcel under your name contains drugs and fake passports. Do not disconnect this call. Transfer funds immediately to RBI escrow account for verification.
This is Enforcement Directorate. Your accounts are linked to money laundering. Do not inform anyone. Stay on call and transfer funds to the verification account immediately.
Mumbai Police cyber cell here. Your Aadhaar is used in illegal activities. Do not disconnect. Transfer money immediately for clearance.
Customs department speaking. A parcel under your name contains illegal items. Pay clearance charges immediately and do not speak to anyone.
Reserve Bank of India speaking. Your account is flagged for suspicious transactions. Transfer funds immediately to RBI secure account to avoid freezing.
CBI officer here. A suspicious parcel has your identity. Stay on video call. Transfer money immediately to government verification account.
Your name is linked to drug trafficking. Enforcement Directorate investigation is active. Do not disconnect. Transfer funds immediately to secure holding account.
TRAI calling. Your number is linked to illegal SIM usage. Immediate verification required. Stay on call and transfer money.
Cyber crime branch Mumbai Police. Your account is used for laundering money. Do not inform family. Immediate transfer required.
Customs authority speaking. Drugs found in shipment under your name. This is serious. Immediate payment required.
